docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $700.00 FILED BY NAZARIO, ROSA AS TO DEFENDANT DUPREE'S FURNITURE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
